description_long: This object is a horizontal industrial pumping station assembly, featuring a series of interconnected black metal pipes with two prominent blue valve housings mounted on sturdy metal supports. The assembly includes multiple hand-operated wheel valves, pressure gauges, and smaller control valves distributed along its length. The main pipeline is flanked by two 90-degree elbow joints at each end, allowing for directional flow changes. The blue valve housings are robust and angular, with visible bolted flanges and metallic fittings. The overall construction is heavy-duty, designed for high-pressure water or fluid management in urban infrastructure. The surface shows signs of industrial use, with a matte finish and some minor wear.
description: A robust, horizontal industrial pumping station with blue valve housings, black pipes, and multiple hand-operated wheel valves. Designed for high-pressure fluid control in urban infrastructure.
description_view_0: The main pipeline and both blue valve housings are clearly visible, along with the supporting legs and several wheel valves.
description_view_1: A narrow end-on view showing the circular profile of the pipes and the stacked arrangement of valves and fittings.
description_view_2: A direct front view highlighting the symmetry of the two blue valve housings, the central pipeline, and the arrangement of wheel valves.
description_view_3: An end-on view from the opposite side, showing the pipe's circular end and the alignment of the valve housings and fittings.
